mapper.select: SELECT dg.id, dg.name, dg.display_order, dg.score, gm.id as member_id, gm.name as member_name, gm.group_id as member_group_id, c.id as comment_id, c.content as comment_content, c.group_id as comment_group_id FROM defense_group dg LEFT JOIN group_member gm ON dg.id = gm.group_id LEFT JOIN comment c ON dg.id = c.group_id ORDER BY dg.display_order ASC

SELECT dg.id, dg.name, dg.display_order, dg.score, gm.id as member_id, gm.name as member_name, gm.group_id as member_group_id, c.id as comment_id, c.content as comment_content, c.group_id as comment_group_id FROM defense_group dg LEFT JOIN group_member gm ON dg.id = gm.group_id LEFT JOIN comment c ON dg.id = c.group_id WHERE dg.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO defense_group (name, display_order, score) VALUES (#{name}, #{displayOrder}, #{score})
mapper.update: UPDATE defense_group SET score = #{score} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE defense_group SET display_order = #{displayOrder} WHERE id = #{id}
